name: Daily Chronic Care Monitoring with AI Risk Assessment

parameters.content:
## ⚠️ Error Handler
Catches any failure across the entire workflow and immediately sends a Slack alert to the ops channel. Wire this to every sub-workflow or critical node to ensure no silent failures.

## 🏥 Chronic Care Daily Monitoring Agent

### How it works
Every day at 6 AM, this workflow pulls patient vitals from three Google Sheets tabs — blood pressure, glucose, and activity/sleep. It merges all readings into one record per patient, then runs a rule-based risk scoring engine (built on AHA and ADA clinical guidelines) to detect anomalies like hypertensive crises, hypoglycaemia, or severe sleep deprivation.

Patients flagged as HIGH or CRITICAL risk trigger a clinical intervention plan, a Telegram alert to the doctor, and a detailed email summary. Low-risk patients receive a routine daily update by email. Every result — escalated or not — is logged back to Google Sheets for audit and trend tracking.

### Setup steps
1. Connect **Google Sheets OAuth2** and point all sheet nodes to your own spreadsheet ID
2. Set up a **Telegram Bot** via @BotFather and update the doctor's chat ID in the alert node
3. Connect **Gmail OAuth2** and replace placeholder emails with your clinic's doctor address
4. Ensure your Google Sheet has tabs: `BloodPressure`, `Glucose`, `Activity`, `PatientMaster`, and `DailyLog`
5. Set the Schedule Trigger to your preferred daily run time (default: every 24 hours)
6. Run once in test mode with sample data before activating

## ⏰ Scheduled Trigger
Fires once every 24 hours to kick off the daily monitoring cycle. Adjust the interval or use a cron expression to set a specific time like 6 AM.

## 📥 Vitals Data Ingestion
Reads today's rows from three separate sheet tabs in parallel — blood pressure, glucose, and activity/sleep. All four streams (including patient master) merge into a single pipeline before processing.

## 🔄 Merge & Risk Scoring
Combines all readings into one structured record per patient, then scores each one against clinical thresholds. Scores ≥ 70 or any critical anomaly trigger escalation; everything else takes the routine path.

## 🚨 Escalation — High/Critical Risk
Generates a prioritised intervention plan, then fires both a Telegram message to the doctor and a detailed HTML email. Both outputs merge before writing the escalated record to Google Sheets.

## 🟢 Routine — Low/Medium Risk
Patients within safe thresholds get a brief status email and their record appended to the daily log. No clinical action required — this path keeps the audit trail complete.

## 🔐 Credentials & Security
Use OAuth2 for Google Sheets and Gmail. Create a dedicated Telegram bot via @BotFather. Replace all personal emails, sheet IDs, and chat IDs with placeholders before sharing this template.

nodes.name: Merge: One Structured Record Per Patient
Telegram: Send Risk Alert to Doctor

parameters.message:
=

🚨 Patient Risk Alert

Patient: {{ $json.patientName }} ({{ $json.patientId }})

Condition: {{ $json.condition }}

Date: {{ $json.date }}

Risk Assessment

Risk Level: {{ $json.analysis.riskLevel }}
Risk Score: {{ $json.analysis.riskScore }}/100
Total Anomalies: {{ $json.analysis.totalAnomalies }}

Vitals

  • Blood Pressure: {{ $json.vitals.bloodPressure.systolic }}/{{ $json.vitals.bloodPressure.diastolic }} mmHg
  • Pulse: {{ $json.vitals.bloodPressure.pulse }} bpm
  • Glucose: {{ $json.vitals.glucose.level }} mg/dL ({{ $json.vitals.glucose.mealType }})
  • Steps: {{ $json.activity.steps }}
  • Sleep: {{ $json.sleep.hours }} hrs

Detected Issues

    {{ $json.analysis.anomalies.map(a => `
  • ${a.severity.toUpperCase()} - ${a.message}
    • `).join('') }}

Recommended Action

Please review this patient immediately and determine whether intervention, medication adjustment, or patient outreach is required.

Generated by Chronic Care Monitoring AI Workflow
parameters.subject: =🚨 {{ $json.analysis.riskLevel }} Risk Alert - {{ $json.patientName }} ({{ $json.patientId }})
